name: BigramDim160 + 10% Prune + SWA + SmearGate + OrthoInit + Int6+Zstd
blurb: BigramHash dim=160 (down from 192) with 10% weight pruning post-SWA. SWA start_frac=0.5 (23 averaged checkpoints). Int6+zstd-22 quantization. SmearGate + OrthoInit. Mean of 2 seeds: 1.14767 (std 0.00219). Third seed pending due to compute constraints.
author: Bryce Judy
